query:
SELECT g.name, g.totalEnrolled, COUNT(e.id) as actualEnrolled 
FROM always_on_groups g 
LEFT JOIN always_on_enrollments e ON e.groupId = g.id 
GROUP BY g.id, g.name, g.totalEnrolled
ORDER BY g.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QXWpcJKwPBoGqNG.f679bd03aa5d --database CAeRhAUjAZoEuxNGm5QbPr --execute SELECT g.name, g.totalEnrolled, COUNT(e.id) as actualEnrolled 
FROM always_on_groups g 
LEFT JOIN always_on_enrollments e ON e.groupId = g.id 
GROUP BY g.id, g.name, g.totalEnrolled
ORDER BY g.id;
